name: Potato Refrigerator Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Stir in sugar, salt, shortening, eggs, and potatoes.
3. Add 4 cups of flour and beat until smooth.
4. Mix in enough remaining flour to make the dough easy to handle.
5. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface; knead until smooth and elastic, about 5 minutes.
6. Place in a greased bowl; turn greased side up.
7. Cover bowl tightly; refrigerate at least 8 hours or until ready to use (dough can be kept in the refrigerator up to 5 days at 45°F or below). Keep covered.
8. When ready to use, punch down dough.
9. Shape into 2-inch balls.
10. Place into lightly greased round cake pans.
11. Brush with butter.
12. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
